backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Shayla app backend, defining Product and Affiliate data types, CRUD operations, settings management, HTTP outcall support, and a stub for content generation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three UI features (carved Shayla header text, water-fill animation, and 60-second audio chime) to their implementing source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each utility, component, hook, and page in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, configured for RTL Persian layout with the title 'شایلا | Shayla' and a dark theme color meta tag.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with five lazy-loaded page routes, applies settings to the DOM reactively via Zustand, and renders the shared Header, NeonBorder, and footer layout.
frontend/src/components/ContentHistory.t: Displays a scrollable list of content generation history entries with timestamps, URLs, and per-entry delete buttons using the useDeleteHistoryEntry hook.
frontend/src/components/ContentOutput.ts: Displays AI-generated product content in a tabbed interface with platform-specific formatting (website, Instagram, Ita, blog) and copy-to-clipboard functionality for individual sections or all content.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with a centered animated 'Shayla' logo featuring a water-fill animation cycling every 60 seconds with a chime, plus a back-navigation button shown on non-home routes.
frontend/src/components/NeonBorder.tsx: Renders an animated neon border effect that cycles a glowing dot around the frame perimeter, cycling through gold, violet, cyan, and pink colors with a blink transition between each.
frontend/src/components/ParticleAnimatio: Full-screen canvas particle burst animation that spawns 80 colored particles from a given origin point with gravity, fading out and calling onComplete when all particles die.
frontend/src/components/PlatformSwitcher: A segmented button group for selecting a content platform (website, Instagram, Ita, blog) with active state highlighting in gold.
frontend/src/components/ProductForm.tsx: Form component for adding or editing a product, handling name, prices (with auto 40% markup), description, specs, tags, and image uploads, then saving via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProductUploadHel: Displays structured product data fields (name, prices, description, specs, tags, images) with individual and bulk copy-to-clipboard buttons to assist manual product upload.
frontend/src/components/WaterFillAnimati: A React canvas component that renders an animated water-fill effect, filling from 0% to 100% over a 60-second cycle with undulating waves, gradient coloring, foam highlights, and bubble particles.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor, using the current Internet Identity for authenticated calls or falling back to an anonymous actor, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on products, affiliates, settings, and content history, each delegating to the backend actor via useActor and invalidating relevant query caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Combines a Zustand store with React Query to fetch, cache, and apply app settings (theme, font size, accent color) to the DOM, and provides a mutation hook to persist updated settings to the backend.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that defines Tailwind base/components/utilities, a luxury dark-theme CSS variable system (gold, navy, sidebar tokens), RTL body layout with a background image, and custom scrollbar styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AffiliateMarketingPag: Page for managing affiliate marketing entries, providing a form to add/edit affiliate links and commission rates, and a list view with delete/edit actions.
Page that accepts a product URL, calls the content generation utility with step-by-step progress feedback, displays the generated content, and saves the result to history.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a grid of navigation tiles (Content Generator, Products, Affiliate, Settings) with a particle animation effect on the main tile click.
frontend/src/pages/ProductsPage.tsx: Page for managing products with search filtering, a product form for add/edit, and a list view showing thumbnails, names, and delete/edit controls.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to configure UI theme (dark mode, accent color, font size), content preferences (tone, language, style), and other app options, persisted via backend hooks.
frontend/src/types/history.ts: Defines the client-side-only TypeScript interface for content history entries stored in localStorage, including URL, timestamp, generated content fields, and notes.
frontend/src/utils/audioGenerator.ts: Utility that plays a multi-layered bell chime sound using the Web Audio API with four oscillator layers (main bell, harmonic, shimmer, sub-bass) and graceful autoplay error handling.
frontend/src/utils/contentGenerator.ts: Fetches product page HTML via a backend actor or a chain of CORS proxies, then parses and extracts structured product data (title, price, description, specs, images, tags) using DOM selectors and regex fallbacks.
frontend/src/utils/platformFormatters.ts: Transforms GeneratedContent into platform-specific formatted sections (website HTML, Instagram, ITA, blog) with price formatting and RTL Persian copy-ready output.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with a Persian font stack (Vazirmatn), luxury gold/navy color palette, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes including accordion and neon-pulse effects.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 3) for the 'Shayla' app, recording three implemented features—animated carved header text, a 60-second water-fill animation, and a Web Audio API chime—plus one pending architectural request.
